name: chr19_19q13_31_ZNF_largest_cluster
description: 19q13.31 — the LARGEST KRAB-ZNF cluster in the human genome (~40-50 paralogs over ~4 Mb), including ZNF420, ZNF285, ZNF180, ZNF227, ZNF229, ZNF230, ZNF234, ZNF235, ZNF233, ZNF155, ZNF112, ZNF566. Largest single paralog family in the human gene complement; major retrotransposon silencer.

architecture.internal_structure: ~40-50 KRAB-ZNF paralog genes in tandem head-to-tail at 90-99% identity over ~4 Mb; conserved KRAB-A box and ZnF tandem arrays; abundant intra-cluster SDs of 20-100 kb; collapsed/misassembled in GRCh38 hotspots; species-specific expansion of the cluster.
